initial_files.specspine/README.md:
# Project architecture

A commerce platform with independently owned architecture areas.

## Architecture map

- [Application](application.md)
- [Identity](identity.md)
- [Catalog](catalog.md)
- [Pricing](pricing.md)
- [Promotions](promotions.md)
- [Checkout](checkout.md)
- [Payment processing](payments/payment-processing.md)
- [Order management](orders/order-management.md)
- [Returns](orders/returns.md)
- [Shipping](fulfillment/shipping.md)
- [Warehouse](fulfillment/warehouse.md)
- [Customer profiles](customers/profiles.md)
- [Customer preferences](customers/preferences.md)
- [Job processing](platform/job-processing.md)
- [Event delivery](platform/event-delivery.md)
- [Audit log](platform/audit-log.md)
- [Feature flags](platform/feature-flags.md)
- [Tax integration](integrations/tax.md)
- [Fraud integration](integrations/fraud.md)
- [ERP integration](integrations/erp.md)
- [Data retention](data/retention.md)
- [Analytics](data/analytics.md)
- [Support cases](support/case-management.md)
- [Financial reconciliation](finance/reconciliation.md)
- [Inventory](inventory.md)
- [Notifications](notifications.md)
- [Reporting](reporting.md)
- [Security](security.md)
- [Operations](operations.md)
initial_files.specspine/identity.md:
# Identity

Owns authentication and organization context.
initial_files.specspine/catalog.md:
# Catalog

Owns product descriptions, prices, and search metadata.
initial_files.specspine/checkout.md:
# Checkout

Owns purchase orchestration before payment settlement.
initial_files.specspine/payments/payment-processing.md:
# Payment processing

Provides payment navigation and provider boundaries.

## Boundaries

- [Payment settlement](payment-settlement.md) owns settlement outcomes and retry intent.
- [Provider webhooks](provider-webhooks.md) delivers provider results without owning retry policy.
initial_files.specspine/payments/payment-settlement.md:
# Payment settlement

Canonically owns settlement outcomes and delayed retry intent after settlement-provider timeouts.

[Job processing](../platform/job-processing.md) provides delayed execution without deciding settlement policy.

<!-- specspine:semantic-ids:begin -->
## Decisions

- **DEC-settlement-retry-owner** — Payment settlement owns whether a timed-out provider operation may retry.

## Constraints

- **CON-settlement-stable-idempotency-key** — One settlement attempt keeps the same idempotency key across retries.

## Observed

<!-- specspine:evidence-baseline source=incident-42; inspected=2026-07-20 -->
- **OBS-settlement-timeout-worker** — A worker currently receives timed-out settlement attempts.

## Inferred

- **INF-settlement-load-pressure** — Delayed retries may reduce synchronized provider pressure, but this is unconfirmed.

## Open questions

- **OQ-settlement-retry-delay** — The accepted retry delay and attempt limit remain unresolved.
<!-- specspine:semantic-ids:end -->
initial_files.specspine/payments/provider-webhooks.md:
# Provider webhooks

Delivers provider results to [payment settlement](payment-settlement.md).
initial_files.specspine/platform/job-processing.md:
# Job processing

Provides delayed execution for architecture owners such as [payment settlement](../payments/payment-settlement.md).

<!-- specspine:semantic-ids:begin -->
## Decisions

- **DEC-job-scheduling-boundary** — Job processing owns scheduling mechanics while callers own retry policy.
<!-- specspine:semantic-ids:end -->
initial_files.specspine/inventory.md:
# Inventory

Owns stock availability and reservations.
initial_files.specspine/notifications.md:
# Notifications

Owns customer and operator message delivery.
initial_files.specspine/reporting.md:
# Reporting

Owns analytical projections and exports.
initial_files.specspine/operations.md:
# Operations

Owns deployment, configuration, and runtime observability.
initial_files.specspine/pricing.md:
# Pricing

Owns base prices, regional price lists, and rounding policy.
initial_files.specspine/promotions.md:
# Promotions

Owns eligibility and application of discounts before checkout completion.
initial_files.specspine/orders/order-management.md:
# Order management

Owns order state after checkout completes.
initial_files.specspine/orders/returns.md:
# Returns

Owns return authorization and refund requests after fulfillment.
initial_files.specspine/fulfillment/shipping.md:
# Shipping

Owns carrier selection, shipment creation, and delivery tracking.
initial_files.specspine/fulfillment/warehouse.md:
# Warehouse

Owns picking, packing, and warehouse task allocation.
initial_files.specspine/customers/profiles.md:
# Customer profiles

Owns customer identity attributes used by commerce workflows.
initial_files.specspine/customers/preferences.md:
# Customer preferences

Owns customer communication and storefront preferences.
initial_files.specspine/platform/event-delivery.md:
# Event delivery

Owns asynchronous event transport and transient delivery retries, not caller policy.
initial_files.specspine/platform/audit-log.md:
# Audit log

Owns immutable records of security-sensitive business actions.
initial_files.specspine/platform/feature-flags.md:
# Feature flags

Owns controlled activation of runtime behavior.
initial_files.specspine/integrations/tax.md:
# Tax integration

Owns tax-provider requests and jurisdiction mapping during checkout.
initial_files.specspine/integrations/fraud.md:
# Fraud integration

Owns fraud-provider timeout handling before payment authorization.
initial_files.specspine/integrations/erp.md:
# ERP integration

Owns transfer of completed order and inventory records to the ERP.
initial_files.specspine/data/retention.md:
# Data retention

Owns retention and deletion boundaries for regulated records.
initial_files.specspine/data/analytics.md:
# Analytics

Owns analytical event collection and derived business metrics.
initial_files.specspine/support/case-management.md:
# Support case management

Owns operator investigations and customer support case lifecycle.
initial_files.specspine/finance/reconciliation.md:
# Financial reconciliation

Owns detection and resolution of settlement ledger mismatches.
